mechanics.excerpt: Fifteen meters high and ten wide it took up large portion of the wall and was one of two that could be used bring Mechs into the bay: It was also our closest avenue of escape and Jaime could work on under par cover from the crates and the massive feet of the Man 0 War also knew would have the tightest security yet; testa ment t0 the priorities of mankind: The estate was warded with good security; but the measures in place to keep someone from walking off with Mech were as strict as possible.
